about.title: The El Talkhawy Legacy
about.subtitle: Delivering premium red meat through expert butchery, careful sourcing, and an unwavering commitment to quality — since 1993.
about.rootsDesc1: Founded with one mission — to bring the best red meat to families across Alexandria — El Talkhawy carries on the proud tradition of expert butchery. We believe that beef, lamb, and veal are not just products, but the foundation of a great meal.
about.rootsDesc2: Every cut is carefully inspected by our team, checking marbling, freshness, and quality to make sure it meets our high standards before it reaches your table.
about.value1Desc: Our meat comes from trusted local farms where animals are raised naturally, free from hormones and artificial additives.
about.value2Desc: Only the finest cuts make it to our shelves. We select for marbling, freshness, and flavour — so every bite is exceptional.
about.value3Desc: Your order stays fresh from our shop to your door with temperature-controlled delivery vehicles, ensuring perfect quality every time.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.placeholder: Search for dry-aging, delivery times, sourcing...
faq.empty: No results match your search. Feel free to contact us directly for help!

questions.q1: Where do you source your meats from?
questions.a1: All our beef, lamb, and veal are sourced from trusted local Egyptian farms. The animals are naturally raised, grass-fed, and free from growth hormones or artificial additives.
questions.q2: Are your meats fresh or frozen?
questions.a2: We offer both — clearly labelled in our shop! Fresh cuts are butchered and prepared daily in our store. Frozen items are flash-frozen at peak freshness to lock in flavour and nutrients, with no artificial preservatives.
questions.a3: Our dry-aged beef (like Ribeye and T-Bone) is aged in custom temperature and humidity-controlled chambers for 21 to 28 days. This concentrates the beef flavour, naturally tenderises the meat, and creates an incredibly rich steak.
questions.q4: How do you keep the meat fresh during delivery?
questions.a4: We use our own refrigerated delivery vehicles with strict temperature control. Fresh meats are kept between 0°C and 2°C, and frozen items at -18°C — all the way from our shop to your door.
questions.a5: We deliver daily across Alexandria from 10:00 AM to 10:00 PM. Orders placed before 2:00 PM ship the same day (within 2–3 hours). Orders placed after 2:00 PM are delivered same-day if slots are available, otherwise first thing the next morning.
questions.a6: Delivery is free for all orders over EGP 200! For smaller orders, a flat delivery fee of EGP 50 applies.
questions.q7: Can I check out as a guest without creating an account?
questions.a7: Yes! Guest checkout is available — you'll just need to provide an email and phone number for delivery updates and your receipt. We recommend creating an account so you can track orders and access exclusive offers.
questions.q8: What payment methods do you accept?
questions.a8: We accept Cash on Delivery, Credit/Debit Cards (Visa, MasterCard), and Digital Wallets (Vodafone Cash, Instapay). Just choose your preferred method at checkout.
questions.q9: Can I cancel or change my order after placing it?
questions.a9: Since our cuts are prepared to order, changes or cancellations are only possible within 30 minutes of placing your order. Contact us directly at 17407 to check your order status.
